description: Change-request preview-ready email after Cowork auto-applies a patch and Cloudflare uploads a preview version

values.originalMessage: Please change my tagline to 'Award-winning gardens in Oxfordshire'

expected.subject: Preview ready for your change ✓
expected.body:
Hi Lucas,

I've built a preview of the change you asked for:

  Please change my tagline to 'Award-winning gardens in Oxfordshire'

Have a look at the preview — your live site is unchanged until
you approve.

Preview: https://abc123-customer-bobbuilders.benpandher.workers.dev

If it looks right, hit approve and the change will go live in a
few seconds:

  Approve & publish:  https://modu-forge.co.uk/account/4935d93e/approve-change/req-1?t=tk-1

If it's not what you wanted, reject and I'll have another look:

  Reject:             https://modu-forge.co.uk/account/4935d93e/reject-change/req-1?t=tk-1

You can also see status + history any time on your account
dashboard: https://modu-forge.co.uk/account/4935d93e

— Ben (via Cowork)
